text:
Created attachment 168713
Patch to update x11-wm/jwm to 2.3.5

* Update x11-wm/jwm to 2.3.5
* Remove fixes for Portuguese (Brazil) translation (fixed upstream)
* Hand maintainership to PR submitter

  Changes this release:
